issues.info: Message me on Discord @professordragon, or sumbit an issue on GitHub.

bpm.name: BPM
bpm.description: Enter the song's BPM to make gameplay sync. No upper limit.

use-player-clicks.name: Use player clicks
use-player-clicks.description: If enabled, the gameplay will form around your clicks. If not, clicks will be inserted at random.

spike-margin.name: Spike margin
spike-margin.description: Controls how close the spikes are to the player. Lower values make the gameplay less forgiving. See Developer settings for true frame-perfect (0-buffer) spacing.

experimental-gameplay.name: Experimental gameplay
experimental-gameplay.description: Adds experimental gameplay elements such as late ring timings, jump pads while flying, and green gravity portals.

camera-free-mode.name: Free camera (experimental)
camera-free-mode.description: Enables free mode for gamemode portals.

debug-trail.name: Debug trail
debug-trail.description: Leaves an object trail behind the player while generating. An X indicates the jump button is pressed.

weight-blocks.name: Block weight
weight-blocks.description: Global spawn rate multiplier for ALL blocks and platforms (stacks with subcategories below).

weight-blocks-jump.name: Jump block weight
weight-blocks-jump.description: Multiplier for blocks that launch the player upward (stacks with global block weight).

weight-blocks-fall.name: Fall block weight
weight-blocks-fall.description: Multiplier for blocks that drop the player downward (stacks with global block weight).

weight-blocks-platform.name: Platform block weight
weight-blocks-platform.description: Multiplier for neutral platform blocks that don't jump or fall (stacks with global block weight).

weight-blocks-spider.name: Spider block weight
weight-blocks-spider.description: Multiplier for spider-gamemode-only blocks (stacks with global block weight).

weight-blocks-breakable.name: Breakable block weight
weight-blocks-breakable.description: Multiplier for experimental breakable blocks (stacks with global block weight).

weight-pads.name: Pad weight
weight-pads.description: Global spawn rate multiplier for ALL pads (stacks with subcategories below).

weight-pads-spider.name: Spider pad weight
weight-pads-spider.description: Multiplier for spider-gamemode-only pads (stacks with global pad weight).

weight-rings.name: Ring weight
weight-rings.description: Global spawn rate multiplier for ALL orbs/rings (stacks with subcategories below).

weight-rings-spider.name: Spider ring weight
weight-rings-spider.description: Multiplier for spider-gamemode-only rings (stacks with global ring weight).

weight-rings-dash.name: Dash ring weight
weight-rings-dash.description: Multiplier for green and pink dash orbs (stacks with global ring weight).

weight-rings-black.name: Black ring weight
weight-rings-black.description: Multiplier for black orbs (stacks with global ring weight).

weight-portals.name: Portal weight
weight-portals.description: Global spawn rate multiplier for ALL portals (stacks with subcategories below).

weight-portals-gravity.name: Gravity portal weight
weight-portals-gravity.description: Multiplier for gravity-flipping portals (stacks with global portal weight).

weight-portals-size.name: Size portal weight
weight-portals-size.description: Multiplier for mini/normal size portals (stacks with global portal weight).

weight-portals-speed.name: Speed portal weight
weight-portals-speed.description: Multiplier for speed-changing portals (stacks with global portal weight).

weight-portals-gamemode.name: Gamemode portal weight
weight-portals-gamemode.description: Multiplier for gamemode-changing portals (stacks with global portal weight).

weight-beat-chance.name: Beat placement chance
weight-beat-chance.description: Probability of placing an object on a full beat. Default: 0.9375 (15/16).

weight-halfbeat-chance.name: Half-beat placement chance
weight-halfbeat-chance.description: Probability of placing an object on a half-beat (grounded). Default: 0.75 (3/4).

weight-tap-balance-init.name: Initial tap balance
weight-tap-balance-init.description: Starting value for the tap/no-tap balance. Positive = more jumps early on, negative = more falls early on. Default: 3.

dev-verbose-log.name: [DEV] Verbose logging
dev-verbose-log.description: Logs every fish placement with name, ID, position, and weight to the Geode console.

dev-always-place.name: [DEV] Always place
dev-always-place.description: Bypasses beat/half-beat gating and canPlaceNextFrame — attempts to place an object every single frame.

dev-disable-dedup.name: [DEV] Disable deduplication
dev-disable-dedup.description: Skips the proximity check that prevents placing duplicate objects too close together.

dev-disable-trail-check.name: [DEV] Disable trail interference check
dev-disable-trail-check.description: Skips the check that prevents objects from overlapping the player's recent trail.

dev-freeze-generation.name: [DEV] Freeze generation
dev-freeze-generation.description: Stops placing objects but keeps the playtest running. Trail is still recorded.

dev-tap-balance-lock.name: [DEV] Lock tap balance
dev-tap-balance-lock.description: Overrides the tap balance with a fixed value every frame, disabling dynamic adjustment.

dev-tap-balance-locked.name: [DEV] Locked tap balance value
dev-tap-balance-locked.description: The fixed value to use when tap balance lock is enabled.

dev-force-fish.name: [DEV] Force fish by name
dev-force-fish.description: Always attempt to spawn a fish with this exact name (bypasses all state/tap/tag checks). Leave empty to disable. Examples: 'ground jump', 'block fall', 'yellow orb cube'.

dev-bounds-debug.name: [DEV] Bounds debug markers
dev-bounds-debug.description: Places visible markers at the floor and ceiling bounds every few frames.

dev-frame-perfect-spikes.name: [DEV] Frame-perfect spikes
dev-frame-perfect-spikes.description: Removes the built-in anti-grazing safety buffer baked into spike placement (normally ~8x14 units regardless of Spike Margin). With this on, Spike Margin = 0 gives a true, razor-thin frame-perfect gap. Testing only -- this makes gameplay unforgivingly tight and easy to die to grazes.

dev-spike-hitbox-width.name: [DEV] Spike hitbox width override
dev-spike-hitbox-width.description: Replaces the default 8.0 unit horizontal safety buffer used in frame-perfect mode. Lower = tighter horizontal spacing.

dev-spike-hitbox-height.name: [DEV] Spike hitbox height override
dev-spike-hitbox-height.description: Replaces the default 14.0 unit vertical safety buffer used in frame-perfect mode. Lower = tighter vertical spacing.

dev-tps-adaptive-timers.name: [DEV] TPS-adaptive timers
dev-tps-adaptive-timers.description: Internal tap-delay and place-again timers are hardcoded as tick counts. This layer's update() runs once per RENDERED frame (display FPS), but the player physics simulate on a separate, decoupled tick rate (TPS) that can be higher or lower than your display FPS, including past 240 TPS. Enabling this measures your actual current physics tick rate (via how many physics ticks land in each render frame) and rescales the timers against it, instead of against display FPS.

dev-tps-reference.name: [DEV] TPS-adaptive reference rate
dev-tps-reference.description: The physics tick rate the hardcoded tick counts are assumed to be tuned against. 240 is GD's classic default TPS -- adjust this if you determine the original timing assumed something else.
